name: Resistance Relic
description: A basic Eridian relic that reduces incoming elemental damage. It is a simple defensive pick when you know what damage type a fight is likely to throw at you.
notes:
It can roll up to four separate elemental resistance bonuses.

Its resistance effects overlap with Skin of the Ancients, which also includes Protection-style shield bonuses.

special.description: Reduces incoming damage from certain elemental types.
